name: RuleCondition.constructor
signature: new imports.rulesConfig.RuleCondition({ individual | programEnrolment | programEncounter | encounter })
use_when: Begin a fluent condition chain over the given entity. Always followed by `.when.<accessor>(...)` and terminated with `.matches()`.

name: RuleCondition.when.valueInEncounter
use_when: Open a clause on a concept's observed value on the current encounter. Argument is a concept UUID string. Chain with .defined / .notDefined / .containsAnswerConceptName / etc.

name: RuleCondition.when.valueInRegistration
use_when: Open a clause on a concept's observed value on the subject's registration form.

name: RuleCondition.containsAnswerConceptName
use_when: Match when the observed value contains the named answer concept(s). Pass one or more answer concept UUIDs.

name: RuleCondition.containsAnyAnswerConceptName
use_when: Match when the observed value contains ANY of the listed answer concepts.

name: RuleCondition.defined
use_when: Match when the observed value is present on the entity. Chain after a `.when.value*` clause.

name: RuleCondition.notDefined
use_when: Match when the observed value is absent. Common for follow-up scheduling gated on 'not yet recorded'.

name: RuleCondition.ageInYears
use_when: Compare the subject's age in years. Comparators: lessThan, greaterThan, lessThanOrEqualTo, greaterThanOrEqualTo, equals.

name: RuleCondition.ageInMonths
use_when: Compare the subject's age in months. Useful for infant scheduling.

name: RuleCondition.and.when
use_when: Chain another clause with AND semantics.

name: RuleCondition.matches
use_when: Terminate the condition chain. Returns a boolean ready to gate a scheduleBuilder.add(...).
